metadata.description: Agent skills for Russian text processing, translation, and automation tools by @miolamio

plugins.name: ru-editor
plugins.description: Russian text editor — removes AI markers, applies informational style, fixes typography. Transforms AI-generated or bureaucratic Russian into natural, idiomatic text.

plugins.name: en-ru-translator-adv
plugins.description: Professional English-to-Russian translator with three-step agentic workflow: translate, reflect, refine. Produces natural Russian that reads as if originally written by a native speaker.

plugins.name: ru-textovod
plugins.description: Russian spelling, punctuation, and grammar checker via Textovod.com API. Three modes: neural autocorrection, spelling check, punctuation check.

plugins.name: ascii-art-beautifier
plugins.description: Beautifies and generates ASCII art diagrams in markdown files. Aligns Unicode box-drawing characters, fixes widths, validates symmetry. Includes Python validator.

plugins.name: telegram-cli
plugins.description: Telegram client for Claude Code — send/read messages, search chats, download media, manage contacts. Agent-first design with multiple output modes.
